_comment: tokelang.level is the compression dial: off | lite (default) | full. lite compresses subagent (Task) briefs + WebFetch/WebSearch tool results at a conservative depth and injects a concise output-style nudge; full goes deeper. off leaves the skill loaded but inert. Change with /tokelang <level>. The skill does NOT compress the prompts you type — Claude Code's hook contract cannot rewrite user input. Uninstall: rm -rf ~/.claude/skills/tokelang.
